general: imagery should have high appetite appeal
silo images should be photographed consistently according to packaging or product type
minimize reflections on plastic, foil, and shiny packaging, especially when covering important product information
remove unnecessary stickers not part of package design, such as special promotion stickers or legal declarations
packaging and labels should be presented straight, not angled or crooked
photograph each unique and meaningful side of the product package
for round or irregular shapes, present sides so printed information and graphics are centered and legible
front view is the side with predominant brand and labeling, format, variant, and size/quantity
products should be evenly lit from side to side and top to bottom
exposure and color should correctly represent the item
maintain separation between product and background
clip products onto pure white background, RGB 255/255/255
retouch dirt, dust, fingerprints, damage, blemishes, expiration dates, lot numbers, and sample-only information
lifestyle images should be realistic, professionally lit, and styled appropriately to the item and brand
product being sold should remain the hero of the lifestyle image
packaging should be incorporated into lifestyle images when practical to connect lifestyle images to silo shots
items must display all indicated required images and conditionally required images and meet the minimum image count listed on each page
seasonal_notes: Individual brand guidelines should take precedence.
Seasonal imagery should clearly communicate occasion, theme, scale, count, packaging, color/design variants, and how the product is used in its intended celebration or event context.
Keep lifestyle imagery festive, aspirational, and achievable for everyday shoppers.
For sets and kits, show all included pieces clearly.
For costumes and wearables, show front/back views and size guidance when applicable.
common_additional_recommendations: Theme Collection: Show other products in the same theme or party collection to inspire a coordinated purchase.
Color / Design Range: Display all available color schemes or design variants in the assortment.
Size Chart: For costumes and wearables, display a size chart with measurements.
Personalization Note: If the product is customizable, show personalization options or examples.

main_image.label: Main Image
main_image.description: Primary carousel image/hero image for the PDP.

silo_front.label: Silo, Front
silo_front.guidance: Photograph the product straight-on on a pure white background, showing all pieces for sets, full garments for costumes, and primary display for decor.
silo_front.recommendation: Add a straight-on front silo image on pure white showing all pieces, full garment, or primary decor display as applicable.

silo_with_model.label: Silo, with Model
silo_with_model.guidance: Show the product out of packaging from the front, straight-on or top down when applicable on a white background, or on a model when applicable, with full product visibility and no shadows.
silo_with_model.recommendation: Add a front/top-down silo or model image with full product visibility and no shadows.

silo_back.label: Silo, Back
silo_back.guidance: Show the product out of packaging from the back, straight-on or top down when applicable on a white background, or on a model when applicable, with full product visibility and no shadows.
silo_back.recommendation: Add a back silo or model image showing the product from the back with full visibility.

silo_angle.label: Silo, Angle
silo_angle.guidance: Show the product on white background in the angle that best communicates profile, thickness, or shape.
silo_angle.recommendation: Add an angled silo image showing product profile, thickness, or shape.

silo_detail.label: Silo, Detail
silo_detail.guidance: Show a close-up of a key design detail such as embroidery, embellishments, print, accessories, or finish to highlight quality.
silo_detail.recommendation: Add a detail image showing embroidery, embellishment, print, accessory, finish, or quality detail.

silo_front_in_pack.label: Silo, Front, In Pack
silo_front_in_pack.guidance: Show the front of product packaging straight-on on a white background with all branding and key label details legible.
silo_front_in_pack.recommendation: Add a straight-on front packaging image on white with branding and key label details legible.

silo_back_in_pack.label: Silo, Back, In Pack
silo_back_in_pack.guidance: Show the back of product packaging straight-on on a pure white background with all label details legible.
silo_back_in_pack.recommendation: Add a straight-on back packaging image on pure white with label details legible.

silo_out_of_pack_whats_included.label: Silo, Out of Pack, What's Included
silo_out_of_pack_whats_included.guidance: Show all included pieces and accessories in a flat-lay with labels or callouts identifying each item.
silo_out_of_pack_whats_included.recommendation: Add a what's-included flat-lay showing all included pieces and accessories with labels or callouts.

lifestyle_in_use.label: Lifestyle, In-Use
lifestyle_in_use.guidance: Show the product in its intended occasion context and keep the setting festive, aspirational, and achievable for the everyday shopper.
lifestyle_in_use.recommendation: Add a lifestyle image showing the product in its intended occasion context with a festive, aspirational, achievable setting.

dimensions.label: Dimensions
dimensions.guidance: Show product dimensions, pack size, diameter, width, coverage, size, or scale with clear callouts and scale reference where needed.
dimensions.recommendation: Add a dimensions graphic showing size, diameter, width, coverage, pack size, or scale clearly.

dimensions_occasion_scale.label: Dimensions
dimensions_occasion_scale.guidance: Show size or scale using a human reference or clear dimension callouts such as height, diameter, or length.
dimensions_occasion_scale.recommendation: Add a dimensions graphic using human scale or clear callouts for height, diameter, or length.

graphic_count.label: Graphic, Count
graphic_count.guidance: Call out piece count, pack contents, or pack size using bold, clean graphics.
graphic_count.recommendation: Add a count graphic clearly showing piece count, pack contents, or pack size.

graphic_size_guide.label: Graphic, Size Guide
graphic_size_guide.guidance: Display a size chart with height and weight measurements, mapping to age ranges for children or standard sizing for adults.
graphic_size_guide.recommendation: Add a size guide chart with height and weight measurements mapped to age ranges or adult sizing.

feature_graphic.label: Feature Graphic
feature_graphic.guidance: Highlight material quality, construction, light type/count, assembly, storage, branch shape, timer function, power type, or other secondary features using clean badge-style callouts.
feature_graphic.recommendation: Add a feature graphic highlighting material quality, light count/type, assembly, storage, timer, power type, or secondary features.

graphic_theme_collection.label: Theme Collection
graphic_theme_collection.guidance: Show other products in the same theme or party collection to inspire a coordinated purchase.
graphic_theme_collection.recommendation: Add a theme collection image showing coordinated products in the same theme or collection.

graphic_color_design_range.label: Color / Design Range
graphic_color_design_range.guidance: Display all available color schemes or design variants in the assortment.
graphic_color_design_range.recommendation: Add a color or design range graphic showing available color schemes or variants.

graphic_personalization.label: Personalization Note
graphic_personalization.guidance: If the product is customizable, show personalization options or examples.
graphic_personalization.recommendation: Add a personalization graphic showing customization options or examples when applicable.

graphic_assembly_overview.label: Assembly Overview
graphic_assembly_overview.guidance: Provide a simplified assembly or setup diagram.
graphic_assembly_overview.recommendation: Add an assembly overview graphic showing simplified setup or assembly steps.

additional_recommendations: Theme Collection: Show other products in the same theme or party collection to inspire a coordinated purchase.
Color / Design Range: Display all available color schemes or design variants in the assortment.
Size Chart: For costumes and wearables, display a size chart with measurements.
Personalization Note: If the product is customizable, show personalization options or examples.

Dimensions should show diameter, width, or coverage with callouts and scale reference where needed.

notes: Silo Front should show all pieces for sets and primary display for decor/keepsakes.
Dimensions should be applied to the image to communicate size and scale.
Silo Angle should communicate profile, thickness, or shape.
Silo Detail should show a close-up of a key design detail.

additional_recommendations: Theme Collection: Show other products in the same theme or party collection to inspire a coordinated purchase.
Assembly Overview: Provide a simplified assembly or setup diagram.
Size Chart: For costumes and wearables, display a size chart with measurements.
Personalization Note: If the product is customizable, show personalization options or examples.
notes: Preserve repeated feature_graphic because the source page shows two separate feature graphics.
One feature graphic should highlight material quality such as pre-lit, shatterproof, or fade-resistant features, and include light type or count using badge-style callouts.
Another feature graphic should highlight secondary features such as easy assembly, storage bag, pre-shaped branches, timer function, or power type.
Dimensions should show size or scale using a human reference or callouts such as height, diameter, or length.

Color / Design Range: Display all available color schemes or design variants in the assortment.
Size Chart: For costumes and wearables, display a size chart with measurements.
Personalization Note: If the product is customizable, show personalization options or examples.
notes: Silo Out of Pack What's Included should show all included pieces and accessories in a flat-lay with labels or callouts.
Graphic Count should clearly communicate piece count or pack size.
Dimensions should communicate pack size or product dimensions using clean callout graphics or scale reference.
